title: stylidium montanum
intro: Stylidium montanum, also known as the mountain trigger plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae, native to eastern Australia. The medicinal properties of Stylidium montanum include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, coughs, and sore throats. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Stylidium montanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
